text:
tabthorpe    2010-02-02 03:15:19 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/squirrelmail-abook_import_export-plugin Makefile distinfo 
                                                 pkg-descr 
                                                 pkg-plist 
    mail/squirrelmail-abook_import_export-plugin/files 
                                                       pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Allows for the importing of addressbooks from a CSV (comma separated
  values) file. This will be located at the bottom of the "Addresses"
  section.
  
  WWW: http://www.squirrelmail.org/plugin_view.php?id=29
  
  PR:             ports/143303
  Submitted by:   Scott Lambert <lambert at lambertfam.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path

  1.1       +5 -0      ports/mail/squirrelmail-abook_import_export-plugin/pkg-descr (new)
